_meta.purpose: Classification of trapLines in src/data/repertoire.json into one of three kinds — mirrors the pattern from src/data/trap-line-classifications.json (which keys against pro-repertoires.json). Without this sidecar, audit-repertoire-orientation.mjs treats every trapLine as kind:trap and flags sacrificial-attack lines as INVERTED_MATERIAL when the student is correctly down material but has positional / king-safety / initiative compensation.

kinds.trap: Opponent's natural-looking move has a CONCRETE tactical refutation forcing material gain or mate within ~3 plies. Examples: Noah's Ark Trap, Legal's Mate, Nb5-Nc7 fork.
kinds.mistake: Opponent's slip — punished via principle (counting, structural, tempo) or sacrificial attack where the win is positional accumulation. Examples: Fried Liver (knight sac for king hunt), Muzio Gambit (extreme dev sacrifice), Allgaier (knight sac vs King's Gambit), Greek Gift sacs.
kinds.theme: Long maneuvering line about middlegame plans, structural ideas, fortress, bishop pair, pawn storms. Examples: Berlin Wall, KID kingside storm.
